user.title: Cloudflare Under Attack
user.description:
Enter your Cloudflare API token. The token needs Zone:Read, Zone Settings:Read, and Zone Settings:Edit permissions.

[Create an API token](https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Cloudflare. Check your API token and network connection.
error.no_zones: No zones found on this Cloudflare account.

abort.Already Configured: This Cloudflare account is already configured.
